backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Employee, Shift, Timesheet, TimeOffRequest, etc.) and in-memory Maps for an HR management system with role-based access control via an authorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature task: fixing the crash in AddEmployeePage.tsx that occurs when the HR Admin clicks 'Add Staff', covering null actor access, type mismatches, broken form bindings, and unhandled promise rejections.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-line summaries describing the purpose and recent changes of each page, hook, context, and layout component in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Aerotek Employee Management SPA, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the Vite entry module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with lazy-loaded pages and role-based route guards, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and AuthProvider, and defines all HR, Manager, Employee, and Supervisor routes.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based ErrorBoundary component that catches render errors, displays a styled fallback UI with error details, and provides a reload button.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Reusable StatusBadge component that maps status strings (e.g., pending, active, hrAdmin) to styled pill badges using a predefined color configuration.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Defines the React AuthContext with session state stored in sessionStorage, providing role-based boolean flags (isHrAdmin, isManager, etc.) and login/logout utilities via a provider and hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Re-exports useAuth, useAuthContext, and getStoredSession from AuthContext as a convenience hook module.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity state, and delegation validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a comprehensive set of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on backend entities (employees, shifts, job postings, timesheets, PTO, etc.) using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind with a navy/amber corporate OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, and defines status badge utility classes.
frontend/src/layouts/EmployeeLayout.tsx: Employee portal layout component featuring a sliding drawer sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Schedule, Timesheet, Time Off), user info display, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/layouts/HRAdminLayout.tsx: Defines the HR Admin layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for HR-specific routes (employees, hiring, scheduling, etc.) and a logout button.
frontend/src/layouts/ManagerLayout.tsx: Defines the Manager layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for manager-specific routes (team, scheduling, time-off, timesheets, accounts) and a logout button.
frontend/src/layouts/SupervisorLayout.ts: Defines the Supervisor layout with a top header bar and a sliding drawer sidebar for supervisor routes (dashboard, schedules, time-off requests) and logout functionality.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides shared utility functions including Tailwind class merging (cn), date/time formatting, nanosecond timestamp conversions, and a safe string helper.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeDash: Employee dashboard displaying quick stats (upcoming shifts, pending time-off, total shifts) and a list of upcoming published shifts fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeSche: Displays an employee's published shifts in a weekly calendar view with navigation controls to move between weeks. Fetches shifts via a query hook and filters to only show published status shifts.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeTime: Allows employees to submit time off requests and view existing requests grouped by status (pending, approved, denied). Includes a form with type, date range, and notes fields with validation and toast notifications.
Provides a weekly timesheet entry form where employees can log start/end times for each day and submit the timesheet. Displays existing timesheet status badges and supports week navigation.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AccountManagementP: HR page for creating user login accounts with a modal form supporting display name, username, password, and role selection. Handles validation, server errors, and success notifications via toast.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AddEmployeePage.ts: HR form page for creating a new employee record including profile fields, role, and linked login credentials. Validates input, resolves direct manager assignment based on role, and navigates back to the employee list on success.
frontend/src/pages/hr/ApplicantPipelineP: Displays a Kanban-style pipeline of applicants for a specific job posting, grouped by stage. Allows adding new applicants and moving them between stages via modal and dropdown controls.
frontend/src/pages/hr/CreateJobPostingPa: Form page for creating a new job posting with fields for title, department, description, and status. Validates inputs and submits via the createJobPosting mutation, then redirects to the hiring page.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeeDetailPage: Shows detailed information for a single employee with inline editing, deactivation, and deletion capabilities. HR admins can update fields like role, department, manager, and badge ID.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeesPage.tsx: Lists all employees with search and filter controls for department and status. Supports navigating to individual employee details and deleting employees with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HiringPage.tsx: Hiring and recruitment page that displays job postings grouped by status (open, draft, closed) in a kanban-style column layout with applicant counts and navigation to individual posting pipelines.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRDashboard.tsx: HR overview dashboard displaying KPI cards for active employees, open job postings, pending time-off requests, and department count. Each card links to the relevant HR sub-page.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRTimesheetPage.ts: HR timesheet management page that lists all timesheets with filtering/search, allows HR to approve or deny manager-approved timesheets, and shows a deny dialog requiring a comment.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOBalancesPage.ts: Page for HR to view and adjust PTO balances for all employees, showing each employee's current balance and policy with a modal dialog for making adjustments.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOPoliciesPage.ts: Page listing all PTO policies in a card grid with accrual rate, max carry-over, and eligible leave types, with options to create new policies or edit existing ones.
Form page for creating or editing a PTO policy, handling fields for name, accrual rate, max carry-over, and a dynamic list of eligible leave types with validation.
frontend/src/pages/hr/SchedulingPage.tsx: HR scheduling page that displays a weekly calendar grid for a selected department, allowing HR staff to add, delete, publish, and unpublish shifts via modals and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/hr/TimeOffRequestsPag: HR page for reviewing employee time-off requests, displaying pending and processed requests in tables with approve/deny actions and a denial-reason modal.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting username/password authentication and badge scanning (via camera barcode detection or manual input), routing users to their role-specific dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerAccoun: Manager page for creating new Employee or Manager login accounts via a form modal with validation, password visibility toggles, and server error handling.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerDashbo: Manager dashboard showing KPI cards for active team members, scheduling, and pending time-off approvals, with navigation links to relevant sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerSchedu: Manager-facing weekly scheduling page scoped to the manager's department, supporting shift creation, deletion, and publish/unpublish actions with draft-state awareness.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTeamPa: Displays a searchable table of all employees with their name, department, job title, start date, and status. Uses the useGetAllEmployees hook and renders skeleton loaders while fetching.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimeOf: Manager page for reviewing employee time-off requests, split into pending and processed sections with approve/deny actions. Deny action opens a modal requiring a comment before submission.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimesh: Manager page for reviewing submitted employee timesheets, allowing approval or denial with a required comment via a dialog. Displays pending and already-reviewed timesheets in separate sections with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/supervisor/Supervisor: Supervisor dashboard showing KPI cards for total employees, pending time-off requests, and total requests, with quick-action navigation buttons. Fetches employee and time-off data directly via useQuery with the actor.

Supervisor page for viewing department shift schedules in a weekly calendar grid, with department selection and week navigation controls. Fetches shifts by department and maps them to days of the selected week.
React page for supervisors to view, approve, and deny employee time-off requests, with a modal for entering denial reasons and separate sections for pending and processed requests.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, amber, sidebar, chart), CSS variable-based theming with oklch colors, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the 'Aerotek (IU) Employee Management' HR platform, including its architecture, roles, existing features, and known issues such as login errors and startup crashes.
